chunks.text: Kenneth K. Mei | EECS at UC Berkeley Kenneth K. Mei: Faculty Home Page Kenneth K. Mei Former Professor Emeritus Biography Kenneth Mei received his PhD from the University of Wisconsin, Madison Research Interests: Electromagnetic theory; Antennas; Computer-aided analysis; Modeling of high-frequency and high-speed components Selected Honors and Awards IEEE Electromagnetics Award , 2009 Institute of Electrical & Electronics Engineers (IEEE) Fellow , 1979 APS Transactions on Antennas and Propagation Special Recognition Paper , 1967
